decisions.what: Captured original submit button text into a constant instead of hard-coding the restore label
decisions.why: Keeps JS decoupled from the HTML copy so changing the button label in index.html doesn't silently desync with the JS restoration logic

decisions.what: Cleared textContent when hiding message containers
decisions.why: Prevents stale content from being re-announced by aria-live regions if the same container is shown again later
Matches the spec exactly and preserves defer semantics so DOM is parsed before the script runs

decisions.what: Parsed Formspree error responses for both `data.error` and `data.errors[]` shapes
decisions.why: Formspree returns validation problems under `errors` and generic failures under `error`; handling both surfaces actionable messages to the user
